patch.description:
Soft delete a user by marking them as inactive (isActive = false).
- Admins and coordinators can deactivate users
- Coordinators cannot deactivate admin or coordinator users
- Guardians/tutors: cannot deactivate if there are pending payments in the last 2 years
- Coordinators: cannot deactivate if any of the last 12 months (excluding current) are pending or missing

400.description: Cannot deactivate due to pending or missing payments

403.description: Forbidden - user lacks permission to deactivate this user

patch.description:
Reactivates a previously deactivated user (isActive = true).
- Admins and coordinators can reactivate users
- Coordinators cannot reactivate admin or coordinator users

403.description: Forbidden - user lacks permission to reactivate this user

patch.description: Deactivates the current admin profit share and creates a new one. The current share remains active until today 23:59:59.999 UTC, and the new share becomes active tomorrow at 00:00:00.000 UTC. Validates that for every institution the new admin share plus the active coordinator shares (at the new effective timestamp) does not exceed 100%. Both operations run inside a database transaction.

400.description: Invalid input or combined shares exceed 100%

get.description:
Returns a summary of amounts to receive and pay.

**Logic based on Authenticated User Role:**

For **admin**:
- Returns global financial summary and admin profit shares.
- \`institutionId\` is optional to filter specific institution class payments.

For **coordinator**:
- Returns financial summary scoped to their assigned institution and their profit shares.
- Institution ID is automatically inferred from the user credential.

parameters.name: institutionId
parameters.description: Optional filter by institution ID (Only for admin role)

adminPayments.description: List of admin profit share payments (only if role=admin)

coordinatorPayments.description: List of coordinator profit share payments (only if role=coordinator)

adminAmountToReceive.description: Total pending profit share amount for Admin

adminAmountReceived.description: Total completed profit share amount for Admin

coordinatorAmountToReceive.description: Total pending profit share amount for Coordinator

coordinatorAmountReceived.description: Total completed profit share amount for Coordinator

400.description: Bad Request (Missing dates, invalid formats, or non-matching start/end dates)

get.description:
Returns detailed financial information separated by user role.

**Logic based on Filtered User Role:**

For **coordinator**:
- Returns a list of coordinators with their calculated profit shares and payment statuses for the specified period.

For **tutor**:
- Returns a list of tutors with their total earnings and payment status for the specified period.

For **guardian**:
- Returns a list of guardians with their total payments and payment status for the specified period.

parameters.name: filteredUserRole
parameters.description: The role to filter the details by (e.g. coordinator, tutor, guardian)

400.description: Bad Request (Missing dates, invalid formats, or non-matching start/end dates)

post.description:
Creates a class and its related ClassPayment.

This endpoint can be used by 3 roles:
- tutor: institutionId and tutorId are inferred from the authenticated tutor.
- coordinator: institutionId is inferred from the authenticated coordinator; tutorId must be provided.
- admin: tutorId and institutionId must be provided.

get.description:
Returns classes with related information (ClassPayment, Tutor, Student + Guardian, Institution).

Scoping depends on the authenticated role:
- guardian: only classes for the guardian's students (and institution)
- tutor: only classes for the tutor (and institution)
- coordinator: all classes in the coordinator's institution
- admin: requires institutionId query param

parameters.name: tutorId
parameters.description: Optional filter by tutorId (ignored for role tutor)

parameters.name: guardianId
parameters.description: Optional filter by guardianId (ignored for role guardian)

parameters.name: institutionId
parameters.description: Required for role admin (institution to query)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). If provided with pageSize, enables pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page. If provided with page, enables pagination.

get.description:
Returns a cash-flow summary computed from ClassPayment.

The returned shape depends on the authenticated role:
- guardian/tutor: { pendingAmount, paidAmount }
- coordinator/admin: { pendingIncomes, receivedIncomes, pendingExpenses, paidExpenses }

Notes about scoping:
- guardian: scoped to the authenticated guardian (and institution)
- tutor: scoped to the authenticated tutor (and institution)
- coordinator: scoped to the authenticated coordinator's institution
- admin: requires institutionId query param

parameters.name: tutorId
parameters.description: Optional filter by tutorId (ignored for role tutor)

parameters.name: guardianId
parameters.description: Optional filter by guardianId (ignored for role guardian)

parameters.name: institutionId
parameters.description: Required for role admin (institution to query)

delete.description: Deletes the class and any related ClassPayment.

patch.description:
Updates guardianPaymentStatus and/or tutorPaymentStatus for a ClassPayment.
Provide at least one of the two fields.
Updates the profit share for a coordinator in a specific institution.

post.description: Creates a payment marked as completed for the current month.

get.summary: Get all active fees from an institution

404.description: One or more fees not found

post.summary: Simulate a fee payment given a custom duration

400.description: Bad request - fees list is required

post.description: Creates an institution and clones fee rows from institution id=1 (The Grange School).

parameters.name: sendInactive
parameters.description: If false, only active institutions are returned. If true or omitted, returns all.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to match institution names

200.description: List of institutions matching the search query

400.description: Bad request - search query is required

delete.description:
Soft delete an institution.
- If the institution has no users, it can be deactivated immediately (no payment checks).
- Otherwise, it can be deactivated only if there are no pending class payments in the last 12 months and all coordinator payments for those months exist and are completed.

400.description: Cannot delete due to pending or missing payments

get.summary: Get deletion options for an institution
get.description: Returns whether the institution can be hard-deleted (no users associated).

delete.description: Hard-delete an institution only if it has no users associated.

get.description:
Retrieve students associated with a specific guardian.
- Admins/coordinators: returns all students
- Guardians: returns only active students for their own guardianId
- Tutors: returns only active students when there is an active tutor-guardian link

parameters.name: sendInactive
parameters.description: If false, only active students are returned for admin/coordinator. If true or omitted, returns all. Guardians/tutors always receive only active students.

404.description: No students found for the specified guardian

patch.description:
Reactivates a previously deactivated student.
- Requires admin or coordinator role

403.description: Forbidden - user is not an admin or coordinator

post.summary: Add a student to a guardian
post.description:
Create a student for a guardian or reactivate an existing inactive one with the same name (case-insensitive).
- Requires admin or coordinator role
- All fields are required
- If a student with the same name exists for the guardian and is inactive, it will be reactivated instead of creating a new record

201.description: Student created and added to guardian successfully

400.description: Invalid input or validation error (missing required fields, institution not found)

403.description: Forbidden - user is not an admin or coordinator

post.summary: Remove a student from a guardian
post.description:
Soft-delete (deactivate) a student by setting isActive = false for the specified guardian/student pair.
- Requires admin or coordinator role
- The student must be associated with the specified guardian

400.description: Invalid input or validation error (missing required fields)

403.description: Forbidden - user is not an admin or coordinator

404.description: Student not found for the specified guardian

parameters.name: nameOrEmail
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search in name or email

parameters.name: sendInactive
parameters.description: If false, only active users are returned. If true or omitted, returns all.

post.description:
Create a new user in the system.
- Only admins or coordinators can create users
- Coordinators cannot create admin or coordinator users
- Admins must provide the institution ID
- Coordinators automatically use their own institution
- Initial password is set to the RUT number without the verifying digit
- Email must be unique (database constraint)
- For coordinators, coordinatorProfitShare defaults to 30% if not provided
- Only coordinator users can include coordinatorProfitShare
- Phone, address, and chargeEmail are optional

400.description: Invalid input or validation error (missing required fields, invalid email format, or database constraint violation)

delete.summary: Permanently delete a user by ID
delete.description:
Hard delete a user from the system.
- Admins can delete any user
- Coordinators can only delete users in their institution
- Users with associated classes cannot be deleted (guardian/tutor)
- Admin users cannot be deleted

403.description: Forbidden - user lacks permission to delete this user

get.description:
Returns user details.
- For guardians/tutors, only active students are returned

patch.summary: Edit a user's bank account information

get.summary: Get tutor links for a user
get.description:
Returns tutor links. Only active links are returned by default,
and guardians must be active to be included.

get.summary: Get guardian links for a user

MonthYear.description: Month and year in MM-YYYY format

rut.description: RUT in format XX.XXX.XXX-K (required, used to generate initial password)

institutionId.description: Institution ID (required for non-admin users, inferred for coordinators)

EditAdminProfitShareInput.description: Updates admin profit share using day-boundary activation (new share starts next day at 00:00:00.000 UTC).

availableSince.description: Effective start timestamp (next day at 00:00:00.000 UTC).

TutorLink.description: Tutor link with active guardian only.

CreateClassAsTutorInput.description: Tutor creates a class. institutionId and tutorId are inferred from the authenticated tutor.

tutorId.description: Tutor who will teach the class

CreateClassAsCoordinatorInput.description: Coordinator creates a class. institutionId is inferred from the authenticated coordinator; tutorId must be provided.

tutorId.description: Tutor who will teach the class

CreateClassAsAdminInput.description: Admin creates a class. tutorId and institutionId must be provided.

CreateClassInput.description: Role-based input. Required fields depend on authenticated user role (tutor/coordinator/admin).

pendingAmount.description: Pending amount for the authenticated role

paidAmount.description: Paid amount for the authenticated role

ClassesCashFlowSummaryResponse.description: Cash-flow summary. Shape depends on authenticated role (guardian/tutor vs coordinator/admin).

ClassDetails.description: Class with included relations: ClassPayment, Tutor, Student (with Guardian), Institution.

UpdateClassPaymentStatusInput.description: Provide at least one of guardianPaymentStatus or tutorPaymentStatus.

coordinatorProfitShare.description: Profit share percentage for coordinator users. Defaults to 30 when omitted.

UserByIdResponse.description: UserDetail with optional profit share fields. coordinatorProfitShare is only present when user role is coordinator. adminProfitShare is only present when user role is admin.

coordinatorProfitShare.description: Profit share percentage for coordinator users. Only present when user role is coordinator.

adminProfitShare.description: Current active profit share percentage for admin users. Only present when user role is admin.

fees.description: Array of fees to update. Can also be a single fee object for backward compatibility.

institution.description: Institution ID (required for admin, inferred for coordinator)

reactivated.description: True when an existing inactive student was reactivated instead of creating a new record
